title: neoporteria recondita var. residua
intro: Neoporteria recondita var. residua is a type of cactus, specifically a variety of the Neoporteria recondita plant, known for its unique and striking appearance. The medicinal properties of Neoporteria recondita var. residua include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and certain infections, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. In traditional medicine, Neoporteria recondita var. residua is often prepared as a tincture or tea, and may also be used in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
